meta.title: The False Gospel of Roman Catholicism - Part 2
meta.author: James White

questions.question: According to the message, the first major *written* Reformation-era debate paired Martin Luther’s *The Bondage of the Will* with which work?
options: *On the Babylonian Captivity of the Church*

questions.question: In the exposition of Romans 5:1, peace with God is tied most directly to which prior reality?
options: Perfect obedience to the moral law
Completion of the church’s sacramental requirements

questions.question: What does *sola Scriptura* mean in this sermon’s Protestant framing?
options: Scripture is helpful but not necessary for doctrine
Scripture is the church’s sole infallible rule of faith
Tradition and Scripture are co-equal without hierarchy
questions.answer: Scripture is the church’s sole infallible rule of faith

questions.question: Which debater is named in connection with a January 1991 San Diego debate on justification and the “shalom tonight” line of questioning?
Paul’s catena in Romans 4:7–8 quotes which psalm (numbered by Hebrew/English psalm tradition)?
Which Old Testament verse is cited as central to Paul’s argument in Romans 4 about Abraham?
The quotation about uncertainty of the state of grace is attributed to Ludwig Ott in which book?
In the Roman Catholic framework *as summarized in the sermon*, what is said about venial sin relative to the “state of grace”?
options: It ends the possibility of confession
It is identical to mortal sin in consequence
It stains the soul but does not destroy the grace of justification
questions.answer: It stains the soul but does not destroy the grace of justification

questions.question: When correcting the Sadducees, Jesus supports his argument by appealing to Moses in which book?
In the Luther illustration discussed, Christ’s righteousness is compared to what covering a dung hill?
options: A wedding garment woven over a lifetime

questions.question: Which Pauline text is quoted for the line about not yielding to false brothers so the truth of the gospel might remain?
J. Gresham Machen’s book used to argue that theological liberalism is a different religion is titled:
The idiom “crossing the Tiber” is used to describe what phenomenon?
options: Moving to Phoenix for seminary studies
Rejecting the doctrine of the Trinity

questions.question: According to the historical note in the sermon, who elected the bishop of Rome during the first thousand years?
What does the speaker claim Joseph Smith’s “Inspired Version” did at Romans 4:5?
options: It denied that God justifies the ungodly
It added a reference to the magisterium
questions.answer: It denied that God justifies the ungodly

questions.question: The label *sola ecclesia* is used to summarize which alleged Roman Catholic posture?
options: Faith alone without works of any kind
The church as final authority over meaning of Scripture and tradition
questions.answer: The church as final authority over meaning of Scripture and tradition

questions.question: How does the sermon characterize *shalom* for the purpose of the Pacwa illustration?
options: A mere ceasefire while defenses stay mobilized
A positive state of well-being and right relationship, not only absence of conflict
A synonym for subjective calm unrelated to God
A political peace treaty between nations only
questions.answer: A positive state of well-being and right relationship, not only absence of conflict

questions.question: In Romans 4:4, why is a worker’s wage *not* “according to grace” in Paul’s contrast?
options: Because grace excludes payment of any kind
Because wages are owed as a debt—what is due
Because Paul rejects ordinary labor ethics
questions.answer: Because wages are owed as a debt—what is due

questions.question: According to the speaker’s application, who is the “blessed man” of Romans 4:8?
options: Only a person who has never committed any sin after baptism
Only those who receive a special revelation about their state of grace
Every person who truly believes in Jesus Christ for salvation
questions.answer: Every person who truly believes in Jesus Christ for salvation

questions.question: Which recent political figure is discussed as a Protestant convert to Roman Catholicism who emphasizes basic Christological “fundamentals”?
The speaker identifies his seminary role at which institution?
Peter’s description of Scripture’s origin is summarized with which phrase about the Holy Spirit?
options: Scripture is the church’s invention for discipline
Men spoke from God as they were carried along by the Holy Spirit
Prophets wrote by majority vote of the synagogue
Angels dictated every word without human agency
questions.answer: Men spoke from God as they were carried along by the Holy Spirit

questions.question: Which Catholic Answers representative is named alongside Trent Horn as a 2024 debate partner on authority-related themes?
The core contrast drawn from justification language is: Rome says you must fulfill conditions to achieve justification, while the Bible teaches what?
options: Conditions are irrelevant because sin is unreal
Jesus Christ fulfilled the conditions in your place
Only monastics can fulfill the conditions
Faith is a work that earns a wage from God
questions.answer: Jesus Christ fulfilled the conditions in your place

questions.question: The speaker’s longer book title echoing Romans 4:5 is:
In the “baptized dung into gold” counter-illustration, what is purgatory said to accomplish for the pile of gold?
options: It turns gold back into dung permanently
It removes mortal sin only, never venial
It cleans flecks of “manure” from the gold by suffering/fire
questions.answer: It cleans flecks of “manure” from the gold by suffering/fire
